name: Brain MRI Pituitary Protocol
description: Brain MRI dedicated pituitary protocol with dynamic contrast imaging

findings.technique: MRI sella with thin-section sagittal and coronal T1, T2, and dynamic post-contrast sequences.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Pituitary Gland
sections.content: Pituitary gland is [normal in size / homogeneous signal / no focal lesion]. No microadenoma or macroadenoma identified.

sections.name: Pituitary Stalk
sections.content: Pituitary stalk is [midline / normal / no deviation / no thickening].

sections.name: Sella Region
sections.content: Sella turcica is [normal / no bone destruction]. Cavernous sinus: [patent / no invasion].

sections.name: Optic Chiasm
sections.content: Optic chiasm is [normal / no elevation / no compression].

impression:
1. Normal pituitary MRI.
2. No pituitary adenoma or sellar mass identified.
